title: Golden Debris
description: Stop missing Netherite! This heads-up utility pack gives Ancient Debris a high-visibility gold retextures so you can spot it instantly in the Nether.
body:
# 🌟 Gold Ancient Debris - Miner's Heads-Up Utility
Give yourself a heads-up while mining! This utility pack is specifically designed to help miners easily identify Ancient Debris. By retexturing the block with a high-contrast gold aesthetic, it instantly stands out against the dark Netherrack and basalt, ensuring you never walk past rare loot again.

## 🚀 Features
**Miner's Heads-Up**: Instantly spot Ancient Debris from a distance—your eyes will be drawn right to the gold!

**High Visibility**: The vibrant gold theme catches your eye immediately in dark Nether environments.

Version 26.X Ready: Fully updated with the latest pack_format logic to ensure no "Incompatible" warnings in the 2026 releases.

**Performance Friendly**: Uses standard 16x16 resolution to ensure your FPS stays high on any system.

**Vanilla+ Feel**: Designed to look like it belongs in the game while providing a competitive edge for survival players.

🛠️ **Technical Info**
Minecraft Version: 26.1, 26.2+

Format: **Java Edition Resource Pack**

## 📂 How to Install
Download the .zip file from the Versions tab.

- **Open Minecraft and go to Options > Resource Packs.
  
- Click Open Pack Folder.
  
- Drag and drop the downloaded file into the folder.
  
- Activate the pack in-game and enjoy your new golden Nether!**
